description: A square recruitment graphic for ICE's 287(g) program. The photograph shows the back of an officer in the right foreground wearing a gray plate carrier vest with the word 'POLICE' stenciled in large yellow block letters across the shoulders; the vest has MOLLE webbing and a holstered weapon at the hip. In the background, rendered in black-and-white tones, two more officers in tactical gear stand near the front door and walkway of a suburban two-story house with pale clapboard siding. A large two-line headline runs across the lower-center of the image: 'Strengthen Your' in white serif italic type, with 'Force' beneath it in very large bold yellow serif lettering. The bottom-left bears the DHS seal and the agency wordmark 'U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement' in white. The bottom-right reads 'ICE.gov/287g' (white 'ICE.gov/' and yellow '287g'). The color scheme is blue and yellow.
notable_text: Strengthen Your Force; U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement; ICE.gov/287g; POLICE
